category_sources: source_facts.description says fast and user friendly build system; official homepage identifies Meson as a build system.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is meson; official homepage and GitHub repository call it Meson / The Meson Build System.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Meson documentation site with manual and module documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/mesonbuild/meson, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess populated repos.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a build system; official Meson site documents build commands, modules, and compiler/build configuration.
